name: videomp3word-mcp

VIDEOMP3WORD_SESSION_COOKIE.description: Required session cookie for the upstream videomp3word account used for media transcription.

VIDEOMP3WORD_BASE_URL.description: Optional upstream site URL, defaults to https://videomp3word.com

VIDEOMP3WORD_ALLOWED_UPSTREAM_HOSTS.description: Optional comma-separated allowed hostnames for VIDEOMP3WORD_BASE_URL

VIDEOMP3WORD_API_KEY.description: Optional upstream API key sent alongside the required session cookie when available

KNOWLEDGE_MODEL_API_KEY.description: Optional explicit API key for the structured knowledge model. Falls back to DASHSCOPE_API_KEY when unset.

DASHSCOPE_API_KEY.description: Optional DashScope API key used by the original videomp3word knowledge flows when KNOWLEDGE_MODEL_API_KEY is unset.

KNOWLEDGE_MODEL_API_BASE.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible base URL for the knowledge model. Defaults to https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 to match the original videomp3word deployment.

KNOWLEDGE_MODEL_NAME.description: Optional model name for knowledge extraction, defaults to qwen-plus

MONGO_URI.description: Optional MongoDB connection string. When unset, the server uses an in-memory repository for local development.

MONGO_DB_NAME.description: Optional MongoDB database name, defaults to videomp3word_mcp

MCP_ACCESS_KEYS.description: Optional comma-separated bearer keys that gate the production endpoint and MCP tool

PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Optional public base URL of this MCP deployment

description: Production-ready MCP and HTTP server that turns audio/video into structured knowledge artifacts through a single API.
author: Emzan Technology Ltd.
